title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BEL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
